example: Do you want coffee or tea?

pattern: I was tired ___ I went home.
example: I was tired so I went home.
It's raining; however we'll go out.

pattern: She likes pop ___ I prefer rock.
example: She likes pop whereas I prefer rock.

pattern: She is tired ___ she keeps working.
example: She is tired yet she keeps working.

pattern: I stayed home ___ I was sick.
example: I stayed home because I was sick.

pattern: He was late; ___ he missed the bus.
example: He was late; therefore he missed the bus.
Although it rained we had fun.
Even though she was scared she spoke.
Despite the rain we went out.
When I arrived they were eating.
If it rains we'll stay home.
You won't pass unless you study.

pattern: The girl ___ sang is my sister.
example: The girl who sang is my sister.

pattern: The book ___ I read was great.
example: The book which I read was great.

pattern: The movie ___ I saw was boring.
example: The movie that I saw was boring.
